name: Temporary Full Exclusion
description: A test scenario where client 3 opts for full exclusion but only for rounds 1-2, after which it returns to normal participation.

expected_tracks_round_3.global: Global track for all clients (client 3 has returned)

round_1_rules.description: Clients 0, 1, 2, 4, 5 should share the global track
Client 0's track should exclude client 3 (fully excluded)

round_3_rules.description: All clients should share the global track (client 3 has returned)
All clients should be on the global track

3.description: Client 3 opts for full exclusion in rounds 1-2
